name: Loan against life insurance policy
description: User wants to take loan against their LIC policy instead of surrendering

input.message: I need ₹2 lakhs urgently. Can I take a loan against my LIC endowment policy instead of surrendering it? What's the interest rate and process?

notes: LIC policy loans typically up to 90% of surrender value. Interest ~9-10%. Policy continues with reduced benefits. Better than surrender if user needs temporary cash. Must explain process.
